Patient: 200042384-0-S22
Report: pcr-duplicates-table-HCS
Context: PCR duplicates make the coverage seem higher than it actually is and give the illusion of high statistical confidence. They can change the variant fractions and result in calling variants that are not actually present or vice-versa. Additionally if an error appears at the beginning of the amplification the same error will be propagated to many reads. This table contains the PCR duplicate rate per sample as well as counts of reads that have 2-5 6-10 and over 100 duplicates.

This procedure caries less penalty than mismatching bases in the alignment process. Depending on the data there might be a lot of read alignments with soft-clipping however the number of bases that are clipped should be small. If for a lot of reads the number of soft-clipped bases is high this indicates that there was a problem and that a lot of the data are discarded.

Depending on the data there might be a lot of read alignments with soft-clipping however the number of bases that are clipped should be small. If for a lot of reads the number of soft-clipped bases is high this indicates that there was a problem and that a lot of the data are discarded.
